commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the code repair must be narrowed and the external PR still needs real behavior proof from a live setup.; Needs attention: The diff broadens externally installed plugin runtime execution at gateway startup, which is a plugin trust-boundary concern.; Review finding: [P1] Narrow the enabled-plugin startup fallback — src/plugins/gateway-startup-plugin-ids.ts:2128... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway startup fallback that loads non-bundled plugins when their effective activation state is explicitly enabled, and updates startup tests to expect those plugins to load.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests 0. Total +55 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main derives gateway runtime loading from `startup.pluginIds`, and a plugin-entry-only external channel does not match the configured-channel predicate. This review did not run the reported macOS/Homebrew live setup.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed because the code repair must be narrowed and the external PR still needs real behavior proof from a live setup.
